tutorialSteps.topText: Welcome to Blobs. The goal of the game is to clear the board so there are no Blobs left. You can clear a Blob by merging it with another one that is a different color and on a shared row or column.
tutorialSteps.bottomText: Blobs can be small or big. Merging a small Blob on a big one removes it from the board. Try swiping that small Blob onto the one beside it.

tutorialSteps.topText: The checkered tile at the bottom is a Target Tile. If a Blob of the same color sits on a Target Tile while there are no other Blobs on the board, it will disappear and you win the level!
tutorialSteps.bottomText: Try merging those last two Blobs together to finish the level.
